message:
Prefer background Kafka OAuth callbacks with poll fallback

Use librdkafka's SASL queue + background callback servicing as the primary
path for OAUTHBEARER token refresh, while keeping the existing poll-based
warmup/retry behavior as a non-fatal fallback when setup is unavailable.

Changes:
- enable_sasl_queue(true) at consumer-conf creation time for AWS IAM auth
- enable sasl_background_callbacks on each created source consumer
- track callback servicing mode and setup reason in consumer configuration
- only run manual poll warmup/retry when background servicing is inactive
- expand metadata-failure diagnostics with explicit callback servicing notes
- split metadata diagnostic values into separate notes for easier reading
- add detailed comments in the callback setup and fallback paths

This keeps correctness robust across environments: auth can still progress
through manual poll servicing if background setup fails, but common cases no
longer depend on metadata calls happening at the right poll timing.
